title: Filtering cartridge with flange connecting to a fluid-dynamic system in abutment against a radial rim of the container forming part of said cartridge
abstract: The invention relates to a filtering cartridge which may be connected to a fluid-dynamic system for decontaminating one or more fluids circulating therein. The cartridge comprises a container including a substantially cylindrical side wall hermetically closed by a base at a first end and terminating, at a second end opposite to the first end, in an opening delimited by a substantially annular wall radially extending from said side wall. The substantially annular wall and the side wall are made in a single portion of plastically deformed sheet metal and are connected to each other by a fold. The cartridge further comprises a substantially discoidal flange accommodated inside the container and in abutment against the substantially annular wall to occlude the aforesaid opening. A plurality of recesses, radially extending in the flange starting from the outer edge thereof, and a plurality of teeth, respectively accommodated in said recesses and radially protruding from the side wall of the container inside the latter, constrain the flange and the container to one another allowing, therebetween, a translation along the longitudinal axis of the container but, at the same time, preventing a rotation about said axis. Finally, the cartridge comprises a filtering unit pushed by a spring towards the flange so as to keep the latter in abutment against the substantially annular wall of the container.
claims:
Claims C L A I M S 1. A filtering cartridge (1) which may be connected to a fluid-dynamic system for decontaminating one or more fluids circulating therein, said cartridge (1) comprising: â¢ a substantially discoidal flange (2) including: - at least one first through hole (6), to allow the entry of a fluid to be filtered into said cartridge (1); - at least one second through hole (5), to allow the exit of said fluid from said cartridge (1) after having been filtered; â¢ a container (3) including: - at least one substantially cylindrical side wall (15); - a base (16) hermetically connected to said side wall (15) at a first end thereof; - a substantially circular opening (17), at a second end of said side wall (15) opposite to said first end, said opening (17) being occluded by said flange (2), said opening (17) and said flange (2) being coaxial both to each other and to said side wall (15); â¢ a filtering unit (25) including: - at least one substantially cylindrical filtering side wall (26, 29, 30); - a base (27) connected to said side wall (26, 29, 30) of the filtering unit (25) at a first end thereof; - an opening (28) at a second end of said side wall (26, 29, 30) of the filtering unit (25) opposite to said first end thereof, said filtering unit (25) being accommodated inside said container (3) so that - said bases (16, 27) are counterposed to each other and - said opening (28) of the filtering unit (25) is counterposed to said flange (2) and communicates with said second hole (5), said filtering unit (25) dividing the space inside said container (3) into: - a first compartment, outside said filtering unit (25), accessible by means of 

 said first hole (6); - a second compartment, inside said side wall (26, 29, 30) of the filtering unit (25), accessible by means of said second hole (5) and said opening (28) of the filtering unit (25); â¢ elastic means (31) accommodated inside said container (3) and compressed between said bases (16, 27), so as to push said filtering unit (25) towards said flange (2); â¢ sealing means (32) between said flange (2) and said filtering unit (25), so that the passage of a fluid between said first and second compartments may occur only with a passage of said side wall (26, 29, 30) of the filtering unit (25), said cartridge (1) being characterized in that said container (3) comprises a substantially annular wall (18) delimiting said opening (17) of the container (3), said substantially annular wall (18) being coaxial to said side wall (15) of the container (3) and radially extending, at least partially, from the latter towards a longitudinal axis of said side wall (15) of the container (3), said side wall (15) of the container (3) and said substantially annular wall (18) being connected to each other by a fold, said side wall (15) of the container (3) and said substantially annular wall (18) consisting, as a whole, of a single portion of plastically deformed metal sheet, the outer diameter of said flange (2) being greater than the inner diameter of said substantially annular wall (18), said flange (2) being at least partially accommodated inside said container (3) and being pressed against said substantially annular wall (18) by said filtering unit (25) pushed by said elastic means (31), said cartridge (1) comprising means (11 , 21) for guiding said flange (2) with respect to said container (3), said guiding means (11 , 21) constraining said flange (3) to translate, with respect to said side wall (15) of the container (3), along said longitudinal axis and, at the same time, preventing any rotation between said flange (2) and said side wall (15) of the container (3). 2. A cartridge (1) according to claim 1 , characterized in that said flange (2), at an outer edge thereof, is in contact with said side wall (15) of the container (3) inside the latter. 3. A cartridge (1 ) according to claim 2, characterized in that said guiding means (11 , 21) comprise: â¢ at least one tooth (21) protruding from said side wall (15) of the container (3) inside the latter, said tooth (21) extending along said side wall (15) of the container (3) starting from said substantially annular wall (18); â¢ at least one recess (11) extending in said flange (2) starting from said outer edge, said outer edge being in contact with said side wall (15) of the container (3), at least partially matching the latter, at least outside said recess (11 ), said tooth (21) and said recess (11) being shaped and arranged so that â¢ said tooth (21) is accommodated in said recess (11) and is slidable in the latter with a translation of said flange (2) with respect to said side wall (15) of the container (3) along said longitudinal axis and â¢ the accommodation of said tooth (21) in said recess (11) allows a translation between said flange (2) and said side wall (15) of the container (3) along said longitudinal axis, while at the same time preventing a rotation therebetween about said longitudinal axis. 4. A cartridge (1 ) according to claim 3, characterized in that said flange (2), at said outer edge, comprises a rim (13) substantially shaped like a cylindrical wall interrupted at said recess (11) and extending towards said base (16) of the container (3), said flange (2) and said side wall (15) of the container (3) being in contact with each other, matching, at least partially, at least at said rim (13). 5. A cartridge (1) according to claim 4, characterized in that said rim (13) is connected to a remaining portion of said flange (2) by a fold, said flange (2) consisting of a single portion of perforated and plastically deformed metal sheet. 6. A cartridge (1) according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that said flange (2), at the edge (8, 7) delimiting each of said first and second holes (6, 5), comprises a rim (10, 9) substantially shaped like a cylindrical wall 

extending towards said base (16) of the container (3). 7. A cartridge (1) according to claim 6 when depending on claim 5, characterized in that said rims (10, 9) of the first and second holes (6, 5) are connected to a remaining portion of said flange (2) by respective folds made at the edges (8, 7) delimiting said first and second holes (6, 5). 8. A cartridge (1) according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that said flange (2) is in contact with said substantially annular wall (18) by partially matching the latter at a peripheral portion of said substantially annular wall (18) consecutive to said side wall (15) of the container (3). 9. A cartridge (1) according to one of the preceding claims, characterized in that said substantially annular wall (18), at a face thereof facing towards the outside of said container (3), comprises at least one seat (20) where an annular gasket (19) may be accommodated, said seat (20) being shaped so that, when an annular gasket (19) is accommo- dated in said seat (20), said annular gasket (19) is coaxial to said side wall (15) of the container (3).
